results.rendered_html:
adhiśī 2 A. To lie or sleep upon, sleep in, rest or recline upon; (with
(pb) acc. of place); bhujāṃtaraṃ  R. 19. 32 ; amuṃ 13. 6 ; 16. 49 ; śilāpaṭṭamadhiśayānā  Ś. 3 ; adhyaśayiṣṭa gāṃ  Bk. 15. 114 ; caṃdrāpīḍaḥ śayanatalamadhiśiśye  K. 98 , 206 ;  Ki. 1. 38 ;  Dk. 112 ; to dwell, inhabit  Bk. 10. 35 ; to sit in; athādhiśiśye prayataḥ pradoṣe rathaṃ  R. 5. 28. 
— Caus. To cause to sleep on; darbhaśayyāmadhiśāyya  Dk. 105  placing on.
